items.title: Crystal Palace’s seesaw season ends in triumph … but now a new era begins

items.title: Sinner knocked out of French Open in huge shock
items.summary: Jannik Sinner has been sensationally knocked out of the French Open after suffering from cramping when serving for the match during his second-round clash against Juan Manuel Cerundolo.
